elements.title: a totem pole
elements.contents: ... that one of the original carvers of a totem pole (detail pictured) described efforts to restore it as akin to "sending a carpenter to repaint the Mona Lisa"?

elements.title: Jean Varraud
elements.contents: ... that Jean Varraud once put football star Zinedine Zidane on cleaning duty?

elements.title: 1974 Dunedin earthquake
elements.contents: ... that the number of damage claims lodged after the 1974 Dunedin earthquake was unusually high for an earthquake of its magnitude?

elements.title: Richard M. Hotaling
elements.contents: ... that Richard M. Hotaling maintained a herd of Holstein cattle from Holland at his house in California?

elements.title: Girl Like Me
elements.contents: ... that the music video for the PinkPantheress song "Girl Like Me" evokes a "pre-Brexit utopia", according to the New Statesman?

elements.title: a history of New York City
elements.contents: ... that a history of New York City examines its subject from the metaphorical viewpoints of a satellite, a jet airliner, a helicopter, a bird, and ground level?

elements.title: Muhadi Suyono
elements.contents: ... that Indonesian politician Muhadi Suyono threatened legal action after a Malaysian government website listed reog as a Malaysian cultural tradition?

elements.title: Eiga.com
elements.contents: ... that Eiga.com withdrew an April Fool's Day prank mocking Donald Trump?

elements.title: Kris Lindahl
elements.contents: ... that Kris Lindahl's billboards have been reacted to with anger, annoyance, and fandom?
